items.h: Indie Promotion PRODUCE Joins MyAEW, Announces First Show Curated By Jonathan Gresham
items.p: MyAEW is an international streaming platform for AEW and ROH. It will now be the home to two indie promotions, including new promotion, PRODUCE Wrestling.

items.h: AEW's MVP Doesn't Trust 'Liar' And 'Coward' Triple H
items.p: AEW star MVP has once again hit out at Triple H, calling him a coward and a liar, and explaining how his presence in WWE convinced him to leave the company.
